text:
Questions and Answers
How much is shipping?
For US and Canada shipping will be calculated at checkout. For all others, customers must email their exact address, full name, email, and phone number so shipping can be calculated.
Where do you ship?
Chromaknotz ships throughout the United States and Canada and to other countries except Australia and New Zealand. Customers in Australia or New Zealand are directed to theartofrope.com.au.
How do I wash my rope?
Only wash on the gentle cycle in cold water, place rope in a mesh bag, and line dry out of direct sunlight. Never use a clothes dryer. A drop of fabric softener can add a light scent and softness, but too much makes the rope more slippery.
What is the diameter and breaking point of your rope?
Chromaknotz says its rope is 1/4-inch double-braid nylon with a single-strand static breaking point of 1,280. The page does not state a unit for that figure.
title: Questions and Answers
